name: Architecture Enforcer
description: Automatically enforces the hierarchical multi-agent architecture (v2.2) on all agent workspaces. Patches SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, and AGENT-MANIFEST.md with correct parent/child/layer/tier metadata whenever agents are added or the gateway starts.

dryRun.description: Log what would be changed without writing files

forceOverwrite.description: Overwrite existing hierarchy files even if they already have v2.2 markers

skipAgents.description: Agent IDs to skip during enforcement (e.g. agents with hand-crafted SOUL.md you don't want touched)

templateDir.description: Path to template directory (auto-resolved from skill or workspace/templates if omitted)

hrAgentId.description: Agent ID for the HR (governance) agent. Defaults to 'hr'.
